news.title:
AMC SIP inflows hit record ₹32,100 crore in March, up 8% MoM.
ICICI Prudential sees equity QAAUM grow 2% in Q4FY26; others flat.
news.summary:
AMC SIP inflows hit record ₹32,100 crore in March, up 8% MoM.
ICICI Prudential sees equity QAAUM grow 2% in Q4FY26; others flat.

news.title:
ICICI Pru Life's FY26 APE declined 1%, missing its 10% growth target.
Slower new business momentum contributed to the missed growth target.
news.summary:
ICICI Pru Life's FY26 APE declined 1%, missing its 10% growth target.
Slower new business momentum contributed to the missed growth target.

news.title:
HSBC revises target prices for insurance stocks; highlights preference for market leaders like HDFC Life, ICICI Prudential, and SBI Life.
SBI Life target set at Rs 2,300 (+24.9%), ICICI Lombard at Rs 2,200 (+27.4%), PB Fintech at Rs 1,980 (+35.6%).
news.summary:
HSBC revises target prices for insurance stocks; highlights preference for market leaders like HDFC Life, ICICI Prudential, and SBI Life.
SBI Life target set at Rs 2,300 (+24.9%), ICICI Lombard at Rs 2,200 (+27.4%), PB Fintech at Rs 1,980 (+35.6%).

news.title:
HSBC maintains Buy on ICICI Pru Life, lowers target to ₹690 from ₹790.
Life insurers face top-line and earnings pressure amid volatile markets, weak equities.
news.summary:
HSBC maintains Buy on ICICI Pru Life, lowers target to ₹690 from ₹790.
Life insurers face top-line and earnings pressure amid volatile markets, weak equities.

news.title:
Experts recommend 'Buy' for Gujarat Gas citing strong fundamentals but short-term margin pressures; 'Hold' for BPCL due to crude oil price volatility.
ICICI Prudential, UltraTech Cement, Tata Capital, and Paradeep Phosphates are advised as 'Hold' with sector-specific cautions and stop-loss strategies.
news.summary:
Experts recommend 'Buy' for Gujarat Gas citing strong fundamentals but short-term margin pressures; 'Hold' for BPCL due to crude oil price volatility.
ICICI Prudential, UltraTech Cement, Tata Capital, and Paradeep Phosphates are advised as 'Hold' with sector-specific cautions and stop-loss strategies.

news.title:
LIC, HDFC Life, Bajaj Finserv, ICICI Pru hit 52-week lows amid a 14%-24% monthly decline.
IRDAI reforms, digital transformation, and product innovation may drive long-term recovery in insurance.
news.summary:
LIC, HDFC Life, Bajaj Finserv, ICICI Pru hit 52-week lows amid a 14%-24% monthly decline.
IRDAI reforms, digital transformation, and product innovation may drive long-term recovery in insurance.

news.title:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.
news.summary:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life got partial relief in FY19 GST appeal.
Tax demand includes ₹979 cr GST, ₹1330 cr interest, ₹98 cr penalty.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life got partial relief in FY19 GST appeal.
Tax demand includes ₹979 cr GST, ₹1330 cr interest, ₹98 cr penalty.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life trims ultra-long bond exposure, shifts to 10-15 year bonds.
The company sees better medium-term value in the 10-15 year bond segment.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life trims ultra-long bond exposure, shifts to 10-15 year bonds.
The company sees better medium-term value in the 10-15 year bond segment.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life's board to meet on April 14, 2026, to review audited financials and dividend recommendation.
Trading window for ICICI Prudential Life remains closed from April 1-16, 2026, for designated persons and relatives.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life's board to meet on April 14, 2026, to review audited financials and dividend recommendation.
Trading window for ICICI Prudential Life remains closed from April 1-16, 2026, for designated persons and relatives.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential received IT order for AY 2024-25 with ₹3,910 cr demand.
Issues include taxable surplus; company to appeal the order; no penalty imposed.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential received IT order for AY 2024-25 with ₹3,910 cr demand.
Issues include taxable surplus; company to appeal the order; no penalty imposed.

news.title: ICICI Prudential Life launches a smallcap index fund under its ULIP offerings.
news.summary: ICICI Prudential Life launches a smallcap index fund under its ULIP offerings.

news.title:
Indian insurers like ICICI Prudential, Axis Max Life, and Shriram Life are increasingly trading state bond derivatives to lock in higher yields.
State bonds now account for nearly 50% of bond forward trades, driven by a record ₹5T state borrowing and attractive 50-60 bps yield spreads.
news.summary:
Indian insurers like ICICI Prudential, Axis Max Life, and Shriram Life are increasingly trading state bond derivatives to lock in higher yields.
State bonds now account for nearly 50% of bond forward trades, driven by a record ₹5T state borrowing and attractive 50-60 bps yield spreads.

news.title:
IPO lock-in expiry for 88 firms may release ₹6.6 lakh crore shares by June 2026.
Key firms like Fractal Analytics, Aye Finance, and ICICI Prudential AMC see shares unlocked soon.
news.summary:
IPO lock-in expiry for 88 firms may release ₹6.6 lakh crore shares by June 2026.
Key firms like Fractal Analytics, Aye Finance, and ICICI Prudential AMC see shares unlocked soon.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life reports Feb '26 performance; YoY growth in RWRP at 7.7%, APE at 12.3%, NB premium at 15.7%.
NB sum assured grew 31.5% YoY in Feb '26; company updates hosted on its website as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life reports Feb '26 performance; YoY growth in RWRP at 7.7%, APE at 12.3%, NB premium at 15.7%.
NB sum assured grew 31.5% YoY in Feb '26; company updates hosted on its website as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Gold, silver ETFs fell up to 7.4% despite global price recovery; ICICI Prudential Silver ETF dropped 7.3%.
Domestic bullion ETF fall mirrors global correction amid stronger USD; gold prices in India dropped Rs 2,800-2,900.
news.summary:
Gold, silver ETFs fell up to 7.4% despite global price recovery; ICICI Prudential Silver ETF dropped 7.3%.
Domestic bullion ETF fall mirrors global correction amid stronger USD; gold prices in India dropped Rs 2,800-2,900.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life faces a tax demand of ₹2.16 billion.
This tax liability may impact the company's financials.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life faces a tax demand of ₹2.16 billion.
This tax liability may impact the company's financials.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life received a partial favorable order from Maharashtra Joint Commissioner of State Tax for FY2018.
The GST demand totals ₹216.4 crore, including tax, interest, and penalty; the company plans to appeal the decision.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life received a partial favorable order from Maharashtra Joint Commissioner of State Tax for FY2018.
The GST demand totals ₹216.4 crore, including tax, interest, and penalty; the company plans to appeal the decision.

news.title:
Flexicap, hybrid funds boost India's ₹1-trillion MF club with three schemes crossing ₹1 trillion AUM since May 2025.
Prominent MF categories witness rising traction, contributing to the surge in mega mutual fund schemes.
news.summary:
Flexicap, hybrid funds boost India's ₹1-trillion MF club with three schemes crossing ₹1 trillion AUM since May 2025.
Prominent MF categories witness rising traction, contributing to the surge in mega mutual fund schemes.

news.title:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.
news.summary:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.
